input.question: What percentage of students would recommend courses in each department?

payload.question: What percentage of students would recommend courses in each department?

output.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  COUNT(*) AS total_responses,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(CAST(would_recommend AS VARCHAR)) IN ('yes','y','true','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(CAST(would_recommend AS VARCHAR)) IN ('yes','y','true','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 2) AS recommend_pct
FROM course_feedback
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY recommend_pct DESC

visualization.title: Percentage of students who would recommend courses by department

payload.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  COUNT(*) AS total_responses,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(CAST(would_recommend AS VARCHAR)) IN ('yes','y','true','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recommend_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(CAST(would_recommend AS VARCHAR)) IN ('yes','y','true','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 2) AS recommend_pct
FROM course_feedback
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY recommend_pct DESC
